player_notes.joel embiid: Upgraded to doubtful for Game 3 vs. Celtics after emergency appendectomy two weeks ago; participated in parts of practice but remains highly unlikely to play. Fade all Embiid props; monitor for any further upgrade closer to tip.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Still in concussion protocol ahead of Game 3 vs. Trail Blazers; traveling with team but must complete protocol steps before being cleared. Significant availability risk — treat as questionable-to-doubtful until officially cleared.
player_notes.mikal bridges: Sat most of the second half in Game 3 loss vs. Hawks; coach Mike Brown moving toward reduced role but not yet a full bench. Minutes restriction risk is real — lower confidence on Bridges volume props (points, 3PM).
player_notes.aaron gordon: Ruled out for Game 3 vs. Timberwolves (calf tightness) after being listed as probable pregame. Monitor for Game 4 availability; his absence expands minutes/usage for other Nuggets frontcourt players.

game_notes.DEN vs MIN: Aaron Gordon (calf) ruled out for Game 3, creating additional frontcourt minutes for Denver's bench. Jokic shot 7-of-26 in Game 3 blowout loss — no structural role change but matchup/efficiency note for Game 4.
game_notes.OKC vs PHX: Jalen Williams is out week-to-week with a Grade 1 hamstring strain, significantly altering OKC's offensive structure. Expect redistributed usage among remaining Thunder wings and SGA in Game 3.
game_notes.SA vs POR: Wembanyama still in concussion protocol and not yet cleared for Game 3; his absence would dramatically reshape Spurs prop landscape across the board.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Jalen Williams 19/1/4 (7-11 FG) before exiting in Q3 with a left hamstring injury — Williams did not return and is now listed questionable
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Williams sustained a Grade 1 left hamstring strain and will be reevaluated on a weekly basis. 'Week-to-week' designation is more severe than 'questionable' — he is likely OUT for multiple games, not just day-to-day.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Williams' status from 'questionable' to 'week-to-week / likely OUT for G3 and potentially beyond' in both the OKC vs PHX series diary and the Playoff Injury Landscape section. This significantly elevates Holmgren and Hartenstein's roles and changes OKC's ceiling analysis for upcoming games.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Joel Embiid OUT (appendectomy Apr 10). No return timeline. Typical recovery ~23 days. Almost certainly out for play-in AND early R1.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports Embiid has been upgraded to 'doubtful' ahead of Game 3 vs. Celtics, and that he participated in parts of the 76ers' practice Thursday. He now has a return designation ('doubtful') where previously there was 'no return timeline.'
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Embiid's status from 'no return timeline / almost certainly out for early R1' to 'doubtful for G3 vs BOS — participated in practice, upgraded from out. Monitor for G3 and G4 availability. If he plays, PHI's interior presence returns and BOS offensive rebounding advantage is dramatically reduced. PHI suppressor effect may intensify further with Embiid active.'

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Aaron Gordon (QUES pre-game) status requires monitoring — if he was unavailable or limited, DEN's defensive anchor was compromised in a game that got away from them.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Gordon was ruled OUT for Game 3 vs. MIN with a calf injury (tightness in his calf), initially listed as probable but ruled out two hours before tip-off. His absence in G3 is now confirmed, not speculative.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Gordon's status to confirmed OUT for G3 (calf tightness). Note that he was ruled out despite being listed as probable, suggesting the calf injury is more acute than the injury report implied. Monitor for G4 availability. DEN's defensive anchor was definitively absent in the G3 blowout loss — this is now a confirmed variable, not a hypothetical.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Victor Wembanyama (SAS) — Concussion (NBA protocol) — new injury supersedes rib contusion. No return timeline — must pass all protocol steps before being cleared to play. G3 availability unknown.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland for games this weekend, even while continuing to complete concussion protocol steps. This confirms he remains in protocol (consistent with context) but adds that he is traveling with the team, suggesting active progression through protocol steps — though still not cleared to play.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Wembanyama's note to reflect that he is traveling with the team to Portland, indicating active protocol progression, but he remains uncleared to play. G3 status is still unknown — traveling is a positive sign but does not confirm clearance. Continue treating as 'no return timeline confirmed' until official clearance is announced.

suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports the Milwaukee Bucks are finalizing a deal to hire Taylor Jenkins as the franchise's new head coach. This suggests Doc Rivers is no longer (or imminently will not be) the Bucks' head coach.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update MIL head coach from Doc Rivers to Taylor Jenkins (hire being finalized). Note: MIL is eliminated from 2025-26 playoffs so this has no immediate prop impact, but the coaching table entry is factually stale and should be corrected.
